name: LinkedIn Ads
access_notes: Access to the Advertising API (part of the Marketing Developer Platform) requires an application, review, and approval process; it is not available for self-serve or individual developers.
mcp_notes: There is no official or well-known community MCP server for the LinkedIn Marketing API.

evidence.claim: Access to Marketing APIs requires application and approval through the LinkedIn Marketing Developer Platform; it is not open to all developers.
The LinkedIn Marketing API allows programmatic control over ad campaigns, targeting, and analytics.
Search citation: LinkedIn API Documentation - LinkedIn | Microsoft Learn
Search citation: What is LinkedIn API? Types, Access, and Honest Review

api_notes: The Marketing API allows for programmatic management of ad campaigns, audience targeting, reporting, and lead synchronization.
blocker: The API requires successful application to the LinkedIn Marketing Developer Program, which is gated and typically restricted to incorporated companies.
one_liner: The LinkedIn Marketing API provides programmatic access to create, manage, and report on LinkedIn advertising campaigns and marketing activities.
